security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be manipulated during transmission.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Data manipulation is possible due to lack of integrity checks.

assumptions: The system lacks integrity checks on the vote data during transmission.
The actor can intercept and modify the vote data before it reaches the contract.

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust data integrity checks and use secure channels for vote submission.

description: An attacker may alter the vote data to influence the outcome of the governance process.

security_gap.gap_description: Lack of accountability for votes submitted.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not provide sufficient audit trail for votes.

assumptions: The system does not log vote submissions with sufficient detail to identify the voter.
The contract does not support verifiable vote tracking.

mitigation.strategy: Implement non-repudiation mechanisms, such as digital signatures and robust audit logs.

description: An attacker may cast votes without accountability, making it difficult to trace the origin of malicious votes.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be exposed during transmission or storage.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Sensitive data is transmitted without appropriate protection.

assumptions: The system does not encrypt vote data during transmission or storage.
The actor can access the network and capture vote data.

mitigation.strategy: Implement encryption for vote data during transmission and storage.

description: An attacker may intercept vote data during transmission or access stored vote data, revealing sensitive information about voters and their choices.
